drop table dim.census_population_by_zip_age_gender_race_t;
create table dim.census_population_by_zip_age_gender_race_t 
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
) as 
SELECT 
  substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 5) as zip
  , substring(gender_age, 1, CHARINDEX('_', gender_age) - 1) as gender
  , cast(substring(substring(gender_age, CHARINDEX('_', gender_age) + 1, 99), 1, CHARINDEX('_', substring(gender_age, CHARINDEX('_', gender_age) + 1, 99)) - 1) as integer) as age
  , 'Hispanic' as race
  , cast(value as int) as population
FROM 
dim.ext_census_population_pct12h_t
UNPIVOT(value FOR gender_age IN (
Male_0_year, Male_1_year, Male_2_years, Male_3_years, Male_4_years, Male_5_years, Male_6_years, Male_7_years, Male_8_years, Male_9_years, Male_10_years, Male_11_years, Male_12_years, Male_13_years, Male_14_years, Male_15_years, Male_16_years, Male_17_years, Male_18_years, Male_19_years, Male_20_years, Male_21_years, Male_22_years, Male_23_years, Male_24_years, Male_25_years, Male_26_years, Male_27_years, Male_28_years, Male_29_years, Male_30_years, Male_31_years, Male_32_years, Male_33_years, Male_34_years, Male_35_years, Male_36_years, Male_37_years, Male_38_years, Male_39_years, Male_40_years, Male_41_years, Male_42_years, Male_43_years, Male_44_years, Male_45_years, Male_46_years, Male_47_years, Male_48_years, Male_49_years, Male_50_years, Male_51_years, Male_52_years, Male_53_years, Male_54_years, Male_55_years, Male_56_years, Male_57_years, Male_58_years, Male_59_years, Male_60_years, Male_61_years, Male_62_years, Male_63_years, Male_64_years, Male_65_years, Male_66_years, Male_67_years, Male_68_years, Male_69_years, Male_70_years, Male_71_years, Male_72_years, Male_73_years, Male_74_years, Male_75_years, Male_76_years, Male_77_years, Male_78_years, Male_79_years, Male_80_years, Male_81_years, Male_82_years, Male_83_years, Male_84_years, Male_85_years, Male_86_years, Male_87_years, Male_88_years, Male_89_years, Male_90_years, Male_91_years, Male_92_years, Male_93_years, Male_94_years, Male_95_years, Male_96_years, Male_97_years, Male_98_years, Male_99_years, Male_100_to_104_years, Male_105_to_109_years, Male_110_years_and_over, Female_0_year, Female_1_year, Female_2_years, Female_3_years, Female_4_years, Female_5_years, Female_6_years, Female_7_years, Female_8_years, Female_9_years, Female_10_years, Female_11_years, Female_12_years, Female_13_years, Female_14_years, Female_15_years, Female_16_years, Female_17_years, Female_18_years, Female_19_years, Female_20_years, Female_21_years, Female_22_years, Female_23_years, Female_24_years, Female_25_years, Female_26_years, Female_27_years, Female_28_years, Female_29_years, Female_30_years, Female_31_years, Female_32_years, Female_33_years, Female_34_years, Female_35_years, Female_36_years, Female_37_years, Female_38_years, Female_39_years, Female_40_years, Female_41_years, Female_42_years, Female_43_years, Female_44_years, Female_45_years, Female_46_years, Female_47_years, Female_48_years, Female_49_years, Female_50_years, Female_51_years, Female_52_years, Female_53_years, Female_54_years, Female_55_years, Female_56_years, Female_57_years, Female_58_years, Female_59_years, Female_60_years, Female_61_years, Female_62_years, Female_63_years, Female_64_years, Female_65_years, Female_66_years, Female_67_years, Female_68_years, Female_69_years, Female_70_years, Female_71_years, Female_72_years, Female_73_years, Female_74_years, Female_75_years, Female_76_years, Female_77_years, Female_89_years, Female_90_years, Female_91_years, Female_92_years, Female_93_years, Female_94_years, Female_95_years, Female_96_years, Female_97_years, Female_98_years, Female_99_years, Female_100_to_104_years, Female_105_to_109_years, Female_110_years_and_over
)
) AS UnpivotTable
union all
SELECT 
  substring(Geographic_Area_Name, 7, 5) as zip
  , substring(gender_age, 1, CHARINDEX('_', gender_age) - 1) as gender
  , cast(substring(substring(gender_age, CHARINDEX('_', gender_age) + 1, 99), 1, CHARINDEX('_', substring(gender_age, CHARINDEX('_', gender_age) + 1, 99)) - 1) as integer) as age
  , 'White' as race
  , cast(value as int) as population
FROM 
dim.ext_census_population_pct12i_t
UNPIVOT(value FOR gender_age IN (
Male_0_year, Male_1_year, Male_2_years, Male_3_years, Male_4_years, Male_5_years, Male_6_years, Male_7_years, Male_8_years, Male_9_years, Male_10_years, Male_11_years, Male_12_years, Male_13_years, )
) AS UnpivotTable

  , 'Black' as race

-- rename object dim.census_population_by_zip3_age_gender_race_t TO census_population_by_zip3_age_gender_race_from_LN_t;
drop table dim.census_population_by_zip3_age_gender_race_t;
create table dim.census_population_by_zip3_age_gender_race_t 
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
) as 
select
  substring(zip, 1, 3) as zip3
  , gender
  , case when age > 85 then 85 else age end as age
  , case when race in ('Asian', 'Black', 'White', 'Hispanic') then race else 'Other' end as race
  , sum(population) as population
from 
  dim.census_population_by_zip_age_gender_race_t
group by
  substring(zip, 1, 3)
  , gender
  , case when age > 85 then 85 else age end
  , case when race in ('Asian', 'Black', 'White', 'Hispanic') then race else 'Other' end
;

select sum(population) as population from dim.census_population_by_zip3_age_gender_race_t;
